agora.viewContainer.title: Agora
agora.welcome.signedOut:
Sign in to GitHub to view Discussions for this repository.
[Sign in to GitHub](command:agora.signIn)
agora.welcome.noRepo:
No GitHub repository detected in the current workspace.
Open a folder with a GitHub remote, or [set one manually](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22agora.repository%22%5D).
agora.config.repository: Override the repository (owner/name). Leave empty to auto-detect from the current workspace's git remote.
agora.config.pageSize: Number of discussions to load per page.
